user.title: STIB/MIVB Setup
user.description: Enter your STIB/MIVB API key and preferred display language. You can request a free key at opendata.stib-mivb.be.

add_stop.title: Add a Stop
add_stop.description: Select a line and then choose the stop(s) you want to monitor.

confirm.title: Confirm configuration
confirm.description: Your selected stops are listed below. You can add more stops or finish setup.

error.invalid_line: Could not find any stops for this line. Please check the line number.
error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the STIB/MIVB API. Please try again.
error.no_stops_selected: Please select at least one stop.
error.invalid_api_key: Invalid API key — the test request returned no data. Please check your key.
